ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "required_date" TEXT /* Date the order is required by the customer */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments related to the order */,
  "channel" TEXT /* The sales channel through which the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* The total amount of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* The tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_amount" REAL /* The shipping cost for the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Any coupon or discount code applied to the order */,
  "coupon_discount" REAL /* The discount amount from the coupon */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the customer */,
  "is_vip" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the customer is a VIP */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* The date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* The total amount for the order detail (unit price * quantity - discount) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* The tax amount for the order detail */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* The batch number of the product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The expiry date of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "quantity_per_unit" TEXT /* Quantity per unit of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "units_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "units_on_order" INTEGER /* Quantity currently on order */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a new order should be placed */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is discontinued */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* The dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the product image */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* The date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the supplier's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the supplier */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  "primary_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "primary_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the category image */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order is expected to be delivered */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* The method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* The cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_company" TEXT /* The name of the shipping company */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* The URL to track the shipment */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if a signature is required upon delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that is being returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., processed, refunded) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* The amount refunded for the return */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* The method of refund */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* A code representing the reason for the return */,
  "return_authorization_number" TEXT /* The authorization number for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that was paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* A reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment (e.g., success, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* The payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
